name: Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach in salted water according to package directions. Drain well.
2. Saute onions and celery in butter until onions are soft.
3. Spread cottage cheese over the bottom of a deep pastry shell.
4. Mix spinach with onion mixture and spread over the cottage cheese.
5. Sprinkle Swiss cheese on top.
6. Whisk eggs, milk, nutmeg, salt, and pepper together.
7. Pour the egg mixture over everything in the pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until set.
